name: Kimi K1.5
tagline: Multimodal reasoning model Moonshot claimed matched OpenAI o1 on math, coding, and multimodal reasoning.
seoTitle: Kimi K1.5 — Moonshot AI (Kimi) LLM specs
metaDescription: Kimi K1.5 (Moonshot AI (Kimi)), released 2025-01-20 — part of the Kimi K1 line. Multimodal reasoning model Moonshot claimed matched OpenAI o1 on math, coding,…
overview: Kimi K1.5 is a large language model from Moonshot AI (Kimi), part of the Kimi K1 line. Released 2025-01-20. Earlier multimodal reasoning model line that preceded the K2 family.
What's notable in this version: Multimodal reasoning model Moonshot claimed matched OpenAI o1 on math, coding, and multimodal reasoning.
